title: Moonlit Meadow Echo
theme: Fear becomes silly when friends understand it.
parentSummary: A gentle cave echo story for children who turn unknown sounds into shared giggles.

contentSafety.notes: Reference scaffold only; requires human editorial/IP/safety approval before release.

readAloudText.Drift: Daisy, Dino, and Pip walked slowly through the warm meadow.
readAloudText.Wonder: Daisy, Dino, and Pip followed a soft golden path as the meadow began to yawn good night.
readAloudText.Explore: Daisy, Dino, and Pip followed the last warm light of the day, listening as the meadow settled into its evening hush.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Moonlit Meadow Echo, page 1

readAloudText.Drift: A tiny friend waited near a quiet old tree.
readAloudText.Wonder: Near the old tree, a tiny shape waved eight little legs. Itsy had found the perfect echo spot.
readAloudText.Explore: Beside an old tree root, Itsy bounced with excitement. He had discovered a hollow place where every whisper came back smiling.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Moonlit Meadow Echo, page 2

readAloudText.Drift: The cave made a big sound. Dino held his breath.
readAloudText.Wonder: A deep boo-boom rolled from the cave. Dino squeezed his gentle hands, and Daisy moved close beside him.
readAloudText.Explore: The little cave answered their footsteps with a round, rumbling boom. Dino tried to be brave, but his knees felt like jelly leaves.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Moonlit Meadow Echo, page 3

readAloudText.Drift: Itsy laughed softly. It was only an echo.
readAloudText.Wonder: Itsy bowed and called, “hello,” and the cave called hello right back. The big sound was only a silly echo.
readAloudText.Explore: Itsy lifted one fuzzy foot and whispered into the dark. When the cave whispered back, everyone blinked, then giggled. The monster was only sound bouncing home.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Moonlit Meadow Echo, page 4

readAloudText.Drift: The friends went home sleepy and safe.
readAloudText.Wonder: Under the moon, the friends walked home together. The meadow was quiet, and Dino’s brave heart felt soft again.
readAloudText.Explore: Moonlight silvered the path as the friends wandered home. Dino still felt small butterflies inside, but now they fluttered gently, like sleepy wings.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Moonlit Meadow Echo, page 5

title: The Sleepy Lantern Leaf
theme: A tiny glow becomes a quiet lesson in looking closely.
parentSummary: The friends discover that a glowing leaf is moonlight resting on dew.

contentSafety.notes: Reference scaffold only; requires human editorial/IP/safety approval before release.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Sleepy Lantern Leaf, page 1

readAloudText.Drift: Daisy saw a tiny glow on a leaf.
readAloudText.Wonder: Daisy found one leaf glowing softly, like it was holding a little bedtime lamp.
readAloudText.Explore: Daisy stopped beside a broad green leaf. A warm speck of light rested there, quiet as a secret.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Sleepy Lantern Leaf, page 2

readAloudText.Wonder: Dino bent his big soft head close, careful not to bump the glowing leaf.
readAloudText.Explore: Dino crouched low and held his breath. The glow trembled in the dew, but the leaf did not mind him looking.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Sleepy Lantern Leaf, page 3

readAloudText.Drift: Pip wondered if touching would make it go away.
readAloudText.Wonder: Pip tucked his paws beneath him. “Maybe it only shines when we look softly,” he whispered.
readAloudText.Explore: Pip wanted to tap the shine, then changed his mind. Some wonders felt better when they were left exactly where they were.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Sleepy Lantern Leaf, page 4

readAloudText.Drift: Itsy showed the glow was moonlight.
readAloudText.Wonder: Itsy pointed to a tiny dew drop. The moon was shining inside it, round and sweet.
readAloudText.Explore: Itsy lifted one little leg toward a bead of dew. Inside the bead, the moon had made a miniature lantern.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Sleepy Lantern Leaf, page 5

readAloudText.Wonder: Nobody touched the leaf. They simply watched while the meadow breathed around them.
readAloudText.Explore: The four friends sat close together, letting the leaf keep its small light. The quiet felt like a blanket.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Sleepy Lantern Leaf, page 6

readAloudText.Drift: They wished the leaf good night.
readAloudText.Wonder: When the moon moved on, the glow softened. “Good night, little lantern leaf,” Daisy said.
readAloudText.Explore: At last the moonbeam slipped away. The leaf became just a leaf again, and somehow that felt magical too.

title: Itsy’s Soft Bridge
theme: Small helpers can make the safest way across.
parentSummary: A puddle blocks the path, and Itsy shows that careful making can help everyone.

contentSafety.notes: Reference scaffold only; requires human editorial/IP/safety approval before release.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Itsy’s Soft Bridge, page 1

readAloudText.Drift: A puddle waited in the path.
readAloudText.Wonder: A round puddle shimmered across the path, too wide for Daisy’s tiny steps.
readAloudText.Explore: The path ended at a puddle full of moon and stars. It was not scary, just too wide for little feet.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Itsy’s Soft Bridge, page 2

readAloudText.Wonder: Pip leaned over the water and saw a wiggly tiger face smiling back.
readAloudText.Explore: Pip’s reflection stretched and wobbled. He giggled so softly that the moon in the puddle giggled too.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Itsy’s Soft Bridge, page 3

readAloudText.Wonder: Daisy tried the pebble edge, one careful step at a time.
readAloudText.Explore: Daisy tested the little stones beside the puddle. They were smooth and round, but they did not make a whole path.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Itsy’s Soft Bridge, page 4

readAloudText.Wonder: Dino found a broad leaf, but it spun in a sleepy circle.
readAloudText.Explore: Dino placed a broad leaf on the water. It floated beautifully, then twirled right back to where it started.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Itsy’s Soft Bridge, page 5

readAloudText.Wonder: Itsy raised one fuzzy leg. A soft thread caught the moonlight between two flowers.
readAloudText.Explore: Itsy did not rush. He looped one gentle thread, then another, until the moonlight showed a tiny bridge.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Itsy’s Soft Bridge, page 6

readAloudText.Wonder: One by one, the friends crossed the soft bridge. Itsy smiled from the flower stem.
readAloudText.Explore: Daisy, Pip, and Dino crossed slowly, each step soft and sure. Itsy’s small idea had made the way safe.
